releaseNotes: v0.27.0 — Zone auditing, a new way to audit the pharmacy shelf by shelf. (1) Zone audit screen: open it from the dashboard menu to see every pharmacy zone as a colour-coded card — red means an audit is due, yellow means one is underway, green means audited today, grey means up to date. Each zone can be renamed, set to a counting type (Unit Count for bottle pharmacies, Package Count for the jail), given a re-audit frequency, and grouped with other zones audited together. (2) Zone audit run: tap a zone to start a scan-driven audit — scan every item physically on the shelf, and when you finish, anything you did not scan is retired from stock automatically, so the inventory and the expiring-medications list reflect exactly what is really there. (3) Expiring Medications Hub: a dedicated screen for short-dated stock, filtered to the next 30 days, the 90-150 day window, or everything within 150 days. Local database schema moves to v19, adding the per-zone audit columns; existing inventory upgrades automatically. 501 tests passing.
